summary: Iteration 24 - All features tested and verified. 13/13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Price consistency verified between Hot Celebs banner and Search. Royals category contains Prince Harry, Charles III, William. TV Personalities accessible via search (Graham Norton, Holly Willoughby). Banned streamers (ninja, pewdiepie, mrbeast) correctly filtered from search. FAQ section with deceased celebrities question visible on homepage.
passed_tests: GET /api/hot-celebs - Returns celebrities with consistent pricing
GET /api/celebrities/category/royals - Returns royals including Prince Harry, William
GET /api/autocomplete?q=King%20Charles - Returns Charles III A-LIST, £15M, 161 languages
Frontend FAQ section - Deceased celebrities FAQ visible
Frontend Hot Celebs banner - Taylor Swift shows £13M (consistent with search)
Frontend Royals category - Prince Harry, William visible in category grid
critical_code_review_comments: Price consistency fix verified - Taylor Swift shows £13M in both Hot Celebs banner and Search autocomplete
Banned streamers filtering working correctly in autocomplete_search function (lines 3978-3982)
Royals category properly configured with Prince Harry, Charles III, William in CELEBRITY_POOLS
TV Personalities category includes Graham Norton, Holly Willoughby in TRENDING_CELEBRITIES
FAQ section properly implemented with deceased celebrities question (App.js lines 1179-1194)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 24 features verified working. Price consistency between Hot Celebs and Search confirmed. Royals (Harry, Charles, William) in royals category. TV presenters (Graham Norton, Holly Willoughby) searchable. Banned streamers (ninja, pewdiepie, mrbeast) filtered from search. FAQ section with deceased celebrities question visible.
